theme_description: Luxury Gym Feel. Black, Dark Gray, White, Gold, Crimson Red.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Max size text-5xl to text-6xl+ for H1.

body.usage: Loose line height (leading-relaxed) for body text.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark) with 1px border border-white/20 (light) or border-white/10 (dark) and shadow-lg.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Gradient Buttons using primary to secondary or primary to dark red. Never full screen backgrounds. Use subtle gradients for membership cards (Silver, Gold, Platinum).
visual_enhancers.animations: Smooth Hover Effects (-translate-y-1), Shimmering Skeleton Loading for async content, staggered entrance lists.
visual_enhancers.rounded_cards: Use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards. Inner concentric radius for images.

components.cards: Rounded-2xl, subtle borders, deep ambient shadows. Glassmorphic overlays for floating elements.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-full gradient buttons with micro-interactions (scale-95 on active, subtle drop-shadow on hover).
components.membership_cards: Digital Membership Cards with variants: Silver (bg-slate-300 gradient), Gold (bg-yellow-500 gradient), Platinum (bg-slate-800 gradient with metallic shine).

grids.marketing: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grids.dashboard: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-8 to p-12. Avoid default Bootstrap crampness. Add padding to cards to prevent text collision.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometric. Left-align dense content. Avoid center-everything.

motion.transitions: Specific transitions like transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. No 'transition: all'.
motion.framer_motion: Use framer-motion for page transitions, staggered card reveals, and dynamic tracing beam borders.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use text-shadow over images.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

media.images: Never exceed 80vh on mobile. Max-h-[80vh] md:max-h-none. Always set a background overlay (bg-black/40) for hero texts over images.

3d_libraries.recommended: Framer Motion for simple card spins and interactive UI. Recharts for Admin dashboard.

hero_gym_interior.description: Spacious gym interior, high contrast, perfect for hero section
Modern equipment, city skyline, great for Services or About page

trainers.description: Fitness trainer adjusting wraps, intense look

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Prioritize layered designs with depth (z-index hierarchy).
Avoid generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
NEVER use pure black or gray, always tint them slightly.
Add transition for specific properties only (e.g. transform, opacity). DO NOT use 'transition: all'.
DO NOT align app container globally to center.
Use modern pill-shaped or sharp button styles with interactive animations.
NEVER use emojis for icons. Use proper icon libraries like lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.
Implement micro-animations on all interactive elements.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs. Use the provided image_urls.
Ensure all interactive and key informational elements have 'data-testid'.
DO NOT use a completely transparent background for headers/navbars. Always apply blur/glass effect.
Build files using standard `.js` and `.jsx` extensions for frontend.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a fullstack gym SaaS + E-commerce platform (Warriors Training Zone). Build modern, responsive, highly stylized UI prioritizing luxury athletic vibe. Use the provided image URLs to substitute any placeholders. Apply generous spacing, dark/light toggle logic, and glassmorphism. Create responsive grid layouts. Ensure all interactions use correct Tailwind motion and state changes. Generate code strictly using `.js`/`.jsx` (do NOT use `.tsx`). Attach `data-testid` to all CTAs, forms, and cards.
